title: DungeonCraft: Horizons
description: Do you like Exploration? Do you like Beautiful Enviroments? This Mod has you COVERED. Because of its amazing set of mods like the newer version of Distant Horizons and world generation mods and for exploration we have PLENTY of structures and dungeons!
body:
![dch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae0245afbaa536a18df1e2cc0bf54e5a44d2784b.gif)

Do you like Exploration? Do you like Beautiful Enviroments? This Mod has you COVERED. Because of its amazing set of mods like the newer version of Distant Horizons and world generation mods along with bliss shaders you will get some absolutely stunning visuals. On the exploration department we have PLENTY of structures, dungeons, houses, castles you name it! Exploration will be heavely rewarded too! You can basically get a full set of netherite entirely from dungeons. It wont be easy tho. I decided to keep it as vanilla and uncomplicated as I could, so its not overwhelming. But you will be left in awe.


![mountains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47959951c275ed2156d67861417565cc3ce1c6d3.png)
